body:
✨ Experience a whole new way to break blocks! ✨
With this unique resource pack, every time you break blocks or stones, a dynamic battery-like effect appears, making each hit visually stunning ⚡. Whether you're mining deep underground or building your epic creations 🏰, you'll notice how every block reacts with a smooth and realistic breaking animation.
This pack isn’t just a simple visual tweak—it transforms the way you interact with your world 🌍. Perfect for players who love detailed effects and want their gameplay to feel more alive and immersive. Every strike, every block, becomes part of a more exciting and interactive experience! 💥![This is the shape of the blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f09fa8128509d808d4935b3713e73c5f886de953.gif)
